package rulecoverage

func NegativeBufioScannerSmallBufferForLargeLines() string {
    ruleID := "bufio_scanner_small_buffer_for_large_lines"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`bufio.NewScanner(r)` without `scanner.Buffer()` when processing files with lines > 64KB"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
